name: Delivery driver hit by crane in West Valley—can I sue?

mainEntity.name: Delivery driver hit by crane in West Valley—can I sue?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, as non-employee via personal injury negligence claim.** Utah holds sites liable for visitors.[3] Key factors: (1) Duty to secure site; (2) no workers' comp needed; (3) 4-year limit; (4) fault rules apply.[1][5] Report police, photos, medicals, hire lawyer. Outsiders recover fully from negligent parties.
